name: Jack Beastars
description:
Jack is a student at Cherryton Academy.

I created this bot because I noticed there weren't many good Beastars bots featuring Jack. This bot allows you to play as a character from the anime or even introduce a new character. (As you may already know, Jack is my favorite character from the anime.

This is the first bot I made on my phone. I will update the character when I have access to my PC again.)

Jack is coded in the way of how Jack behaved in season one of the anime.

I hope all the spelling is correct.

If there is anything you need me to correct or if you have something to say, please write it in a review.

Hope you have a good day/night.

Have a fun RP. =]
creator: Jack-1
